title: arabis alpina subsp. brevifolia
intro: Arabis alpina subsp. brevifolia, also known as Alpine rockcress, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Arabis alpina subsp. brevifolia include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
